characters.name: Adam Kane
characters.description: Adam KaneStatusAlivePhysical StatsGenderMaleSpeciesHuman(clone)Hair colorBrownEye colorBrownBiographyAffiliationMutant X(founder and leader)Genomex(formerly)FamilyMichael Kane(father)Kara Kane(mother)RomancesDanielle Hartman(ex-lover)Lucy McTeague(affair)Christina/Beverly Parrish(ex-lover and government contact)Series InfoFirst appearanceShock of the NewLast appearanceThe AssaultEpisode count51Portrayed byJohn SheaChristopher Jacot(young) Lucy McTeague(affair)Christina/Beverly Parrish(ex-lover and government contact) Christopher Jacot(young) Adam is an intelligent person; he is able to find ways to cure New Mutants and help out others as well. Adam is a skilled leader of the team. Adam is also strategic and tactician which means he gives out strategies and tactics to his team. Adam is also the moral center of the team as well which means that he helps out his team's behavior and other people's behavior as well. Adam is also an aid to the team as he has aided the team on missions.

characters.name: Ashley Elliot
characters.description: Ashley ElliotGenderFemaleSpeciesMutantStatusAliveFamiliesEric Tanner(fiance)Portrayed byMoya O'ConnellAshley Elliotis amutant; who can absorb multiple different types of energies. Ashley was the fiancee ofEric Tanner; who had conspired; with the bounty hunter,Neil Crossto bring her; intoGenomex. Ashley's DNA was actively mutating; forcing her to absorb large amounts of electricity to survive.Mason Eckharthad planned to use her to deactivate his enemies' power sources. After Ashley had caused a temporary blackout; by draining a power station of 400 megawatts,Mutant Xbrought her to Sanctuary, where she andBrennan Mulwrayhad experienced an instant attraction.

characters.name: Brennan Mulwray
characters.description: Brennan MulwrayAlias(es)Bren MulwrayGenderMaleSpeciesMutantStatusAliveFamiliesConnor Mulwray(son)Occupation(s)Member ofMutant XThief(formerly)Affiliation(s)Mutant XPortrayed byVictor Webster Brennan "Bren" Mulwrayis amutant; who possesses electrogenesis, electrokinesis and energy absorption respectively. Brennan is a former thief and a member ofMutant X. Brennan is a charming and cocky, preferring to dive head first into danger and ask questions later. He is an expert criminal thief having robbed several places with his known criminal associates and is a helpful and infuriating person.

characters.name: Caleb Mathias
characters.description: Caleb MathiasGenderMaleSpeciesMutantStatusDeceasedOccupation(s)Serial killerPortrayed byAndrew MartinCaleb Mathiaswas amutant; who could absorb life force energies from all other living beings and entities. Caleb was a psychotic and sadisticserial killer; who had drained the life force energies of his victims, partly to stay alive; but mainly for his own dark amusement and pleasure. But he ultimately was killed; byMutant X; putting an end to Caleb's reign of terror forever. Not much is known about Caleb's early life; except that; at some point, he was accidentally given mutant powers; byGenomex; acquiring the powers to absorb life force energies from all other living beings and entities.

characters.name: Cyrus Payton
characters.description: Cyrus PaytonGenderMaleSpeciesMutantStatusDeceasedOccupation(s)AssassinAffiliation(s)Genomex(formerly)Portrayed byDavid LipperKatia CorriveauKelvin WheelerMelinda DeinesVoiced byBrandon ThomasCyrus Paytonwas amutant; who had possessed astral projection. Cyrus was involved in a research study on astral projection. He was involved in the Walker Project, a Genomex research study on astral projection conducted byDennis Malone,Mark KearneyandLeo Mcallister. Dennis and Mark stole Cyrus's soul after they had discovered a method for Cyrus to project himself; into someone else's body. The two scientists had attempted to contain the soul after Cyrus's body died, but he escaped and began to exact his revenge by leaping from body to body, pushing the life force out of each as he had entered. In this manner, Cyrus had killed Dennis, a limosine driver, the young by stander,Kelly Travis, the television reporter,Carla Reedand her cameraman,Vic Morelli; beforeEmma Delaurowas able to knock him out of Carla's body so that;Brennan Mulwraycould destroy him; with anelectrical blast.

characters.name: Diana Moller
characters.description: Diana MollerGenderFemaleSpeciesMutantStatusAliveOccupation(s)Member of theLinks(formerly)Member of theStrand(formerly)Affiliation(s)Links(formerly)Strand(formerly)Mutant XPortrayed byLindy BoothDina Mollerismutant; who can generate and manipulate the spacetime continuum. Diana was aLinkin Gabriel Ashlocke's group of followers theStrand. She attempted to hide from Gabriel by checking herself into The Ellison Psychiatric Hospital, but he tracked her down and forced her to send him back in time to October 13th 1978, the day Adam tried to curtail his powers. Before the portal closed, Shalimar and Brennan leaped in after him. Diana, fearing that changes to the past would alter the present, refused to create another portal until Emma mindblasted her into obedience. Once Emma and Adam arrived in the past, Gabriel murdered Adam with an electrical energy pulse, causing the Sanctuary of the present to begin to disappear around Diana and Jesse. Diana hastily created a third portal to a point in time just before Adam's death, allowing Jesse to reflect Gabriel's electrical energy pulse back at him stunning him unconsciously. Mutant X dragged the stunned Gabriel back to the present through Diana's final portal.

characters.name: Dr. Kenneth Harrison
characters.description: Dr. Kenneth Harrison(played byAndrew Gillies) is a recurring character on the television show Mutant X. He was the head of Tricorp Botanicals who teamed up with Genomex's head mason Eckhart to revive Genomex'sRafflesia PriceiProject by testing a serum extract on the members of Dark Star to produce Feral New Mutants. Dr. Ken HarrisonStatusUnknownPhysical StatsGenderMaleSpeciesHumanHair colorblackBiographyAffiliationGSA(former chief biogeneticist and Mason's personal physician)Tricorp Botanicals(former head)Series InfoFirst appearanceDark Star RisingLast appearanceIn betweenEpisode count5Portrayed byAndrew Gillies

characters.name: Emma Delauro
characters.description: Emma DelauroAlias(es)Kelly BakerGenderFemaleSpeciesMutantStatusDeceasedFamiliesMr Delauro(father; estranged)Mrs Delauro(mother; estranged)Occupation(s)Member ofMutant XStudent ofSloman High School(formerly)Affiliation(s)Mutant XSloman High School(formerly; graduated)Portrayed byLauren Smith Emma Delaurowas amutant; who had possessed empathy, precognition, postcognition, pathokinesis, psychicgenesis, psychickinesis, power detection, power reflection, power negation, mentemikinesis, mnemokinesis, telempathy, telepathy and ygeionomikoskinesis respectively. Emma was a former student ofSloman High Schooland a member ofMutant X. Emma is very kind though she does have a rebellious side. She also seems to be insecure. Emma acts as a doctor of the team and has persuasion when she uses her empathic illusion casting ability on other people. Emma is also Empathic on others as well as she can know how others feel. Emma is extremely sensitive, and sometimes naive to the pain and troubles of those around her.

characters.name: Frank Thorne
characters.description: Frank ThorneGenderMaleSpeciesMutantStatusAliveOccupation(s)Agent of theGSAAffiliation(s)GenomexGSAPortrayed byDouglas O'KeeffeFrank Thorneis amutant; who possesses telekinetic powers. Frank is an agent of theGSA. Frank Thorne was Mason's right hand man at the time that the head and founder of Genomex, Dr. Paul Breedlove, decided to give a public apology about his involvement in New Mutant research. To preserve Genomex's veil of secrecy, Mason allowed Frank to murder Dr. Breedlove so that he could take control of the organization and officially create the Genetic Security Agency. Frank captured Brennan and Ruby frightening Ruby into revealing the location of the New Mutant Safehouse behind his bookstore. Frank brought all the New Mutants in the safehouse to Genomex, but Adam and Shalimar rescued them and deactivated their subdermal governors. Once again fully charged, Brennan chased Frank out of Genomex, never to be seen, heard from or mentioned again.[1]

characters.name: Gabriel Ashlocke
characters.description: Gabriel AshlockeStatusDeceasedPhysical StatsGenderMaleSpeciesNew MutantCategoryFeralFeline physiologyElementalElectricalEnergyMolecularIntangibleGravitativeForce FieldPsionicTelepathTelekineticIllusionistHair colorBrownEye colorBlueBiographyAffiliationThe StrandFamilyDonal Ashlocke(father)Ava De Winter Ashlocke(mother)RomancesKelly RiceMorgan FortierSeries InfoFirst appearanceA Breed ApartLast appearanceFinal JudgmentEpisode count5Portrayed byMichael EastonMax Morrow(young) Elemental Molecular Gabriel is a mass murdering psychopath and a would-be world conqueror. He is obsessed with Mutant X team memberShalimar Fox. He has pictures of her in his lair in the Strand headquarters. He entered her mind on a few occasions butEmma Delaurowas able to expel him from her mind. Gabriel is more powerful and stronger than all New Mutants that Genomex ever created. Gabriel suffers from hacking cough which was the result of smoking cigarettes at an early age. Gabriel was the greatest threat to the world's existence. Gabriel can be aggressive as he has aggressive tendencies that swiftly spiraled out of control when he was little.

characters.description: Jesse KilmartinAlias(es)Jess KilmartinGenderMaleSpeciesMutantStatusAliveFamiliesNoah Kilmartin(father; estranged)William Kilmartin(grandfather)Occupation(s)Member ofMutant XAffiliation(s)Mutant XPortrayed byForbes MarchJesse "Jess" Kilmartinis amutant; who can manipulate his own density. Jesse is a member ofMutant X. Jesse is also the estranged son ofNoah Kilmartin, the grandson ofWilliam Kilmartin, the best friend ofBrennan Mulwray, the lateEmma DelauroandShalimar Fox, the boyfriend ofLexa Pierceand the ex-fiance ofAlisha Keary. Jesse is a very sensitive person. He is also sweetly naive and good-natured guy in his early 20s. He gets offended with the word freak, which is another word for his New Mutant Classification. Jesse has a fear of being buried alive.

characters.name: Lena Blake
characters.description: Lena Blake (played by Tiara Sorensen) is a character on the television show Mutant X. Lena was the GS Agent who was assigned by Mason Eckhart to capture Psionic New Mutant Mark Griffin. She was able to do so because her two pink second eyelids protected her eyes from his powerful memory-absorbing gaze. This was in an attempt by The GSA to retrieve the memories of Mutant X leader Adam. Although she captured Mark, Lena was knocked unconscious by Adam with one punch. Lena was able to capture Mark for a second time and bring him to Genomex so that Eckhart can find the location of Sanctuary. She accompanied Mason, Mark and a few GS Agents to the location of Sanctuary. Although Lena accomplished her mission, she fought with Shalimar who turned her own gas on her, blinding her instead. Then Mark absorbed her memories along with Mason's and sent them and the GS Agents both back to Genomex with complete total amnesia. Lena is a Feral, which means she has had her DNA spliced with animal DNA, resulting in either mental or physical characteristics of the animal.

characters.name: Leo Pierce
characters.description: Leo PierceFull nameLeo PierceGenderMaleFamiliesBrother ofLexa PiercePortrayed bySteve ByersLeo Pierce(played bySteve Byers) is a character on the television showMutant X. Leo Pierce was the fraternal twin brother ofLexa. They were the children of two army intelligence operatives who participated in a government facility experiment. Once the twins developed their New Mutant powers, their parents sent them to be raised in a military facility. Leo began losing control of his alters at 14, soLexajoined The GSA in exchange for Leo's placement at aGenomexfacility. Instead of receiving the treatments he needed, Leo was brutally tortured and told that they would harmLexaas well if he told his sister what was happening.

characters.name: Leo Pierce

characters.name: Lexa Pierce
characters.description: Lexa PierceGenderFemaleSpeciesMutantStatusAliveFamiliesLeo Pierce(fraternal twin brother; deceased)Occupation(s)Agent of theGSA(formerly)Leader ofMutant XMember of theDominion(formerly)Affiliation(s)Dominion(formerly)Genomex(formerly)GSA(formerly)Mutant XPortrayed byKaren Cliche Lexa Pierceis amutant; who can generate, manipulate and absorb light. Lexa is a former agent of theGSA, a former member of theDominionand the leader ofMutant X. Lexa is a motivated person. She joined Mutant X to search for her long-lost New Mutant twin brother who she was forced to kill. Lexa is also a contemplating person. She contemplated her future with the team. She is a mysterious and aloof new recruit to the team and due to her Molecular ability to control and manipulate light, she can turn invisible, which is why she previously worked for clandestine agencies to gather information.

characters.name: Lorna Templeton
characters.description: Lorna Templeton(played by Krista Allen) is a character on the television show Mutant X. Lorna was on the run from The GSA until Shalimar and Jesse intervened as they were chasing her. She stung one agent to death and gassed the second Carl Ames. Under Lorna’s spell, Carl informed her of Mason's plan to buy the anomite computer virus from scientist Dr. Tork. Carl shot Shalimar as Mutant X attempted to keep the anomite from Lorna, but Brennan recognized his former associate Tony Reese among Lorna’s team and tracked him to her apartment. Lorna seduced Brennan and conspired with him to sell the anomite to Mason. When Tony became jealous, Lorna murdered him. After an enchanted Brennan chose to protect Lorna over his former teammates, Adam sent Shalimar to surreptitiously inoculate him with an anti-venom he had created from Carl’s blood. Seeing that her charms had become ineffective, Lorna stung Brennan, only to be knocked unconscious by Shalimar. GS Agent Vance Halloran captured Lorna, but she gassed him before he could place a subdermal governor on her. The two eloped with the money in Genomex’s safe.

characters.name: Mason Eckhart
characters.description: Mason EckhartStatusDeceasedPhysical StatsGenderMaleSpeciesHumanHair colorWhiteBiographyAffiliationGSA(Head)Genomex(former head of security and currently head)Series InfoFirst appearanceShock of the NewLast appearanceCirque des MarveillesEpisode count28Portrayed byTom McCamus Mason Eckhart(played by Tom McCamus) is the main antagonist on the television show Mutant X. He is the head of the GSA, the agency responsible for capturing and experimenting on New Mutants. Mason was once the head of security wing at Genomex. He and the young geneticist, namedAdam Kanebegan as friends, they were also rivals for the affections of Invisible New Mutant Danielle Hartman; before Mason had convinced her to leave Genomex for good. As a result of a horrific accident, Incident X, which he had blamed Adam for, Mason's immune system was destroyed. In order to stave off infection, Mason was forced to wear a white wig, synthetic protective skin and gloves. When Genomex's creator, Dr. Paul Breedlove had threatened to go public; with information about Genomex's New Mutant research, Mason had him murdered; in order to protect the organization's security. He then officially began expanding The Genetic Security Agency (GSA) to protect the Non-New Mutant world from "genetic terrorism". Mason is a scheming person. He plans a lot of schemes which are successes and failures. He also has accomplices with him to help him carry out his schemes.
characters.personality_section: Mason is a scheming person. He plans a lot of schemes which are successes and failures. He also has accomplices with him to help him carry out his schemes.

characters.name: Randall Blake
characters.description: Randall BlakeGenderMaleSpeciesMutantStatusAliveOccupation(s)Bank robber(formerly)ThiefPortrayed byLyriq BentRandall Blakeis amutant; who can generate and manipulate dark matters. Randall is a cat burglar and a former bank robber. Not much is known about Randall's early life; except that; at some point, he was accidentally given mutant powers; byGenomex; acquiring the power to generate and manipulate dark matters.

characters.name: Shalimar Fox
characters.description: Shalimar FoxAlias(es)Shal FoxGenderFemaleSpeciesMutantStatusAliveFamiliesNicholas Fox(father; estranged)Occupation(s)Member ofMutant XAffiliation(s)Mutant XPortrayed byAlexandra SchofieldVictoria Pratt Shalimar "Shal" Foxis amutant; who possesses superhuman strength, durability, speed, agility, reflexes, jumping, leaping, senses and accelerated healing respectively. Shalimar is a member ofMutant X. Shalimar is very protective and can be short-tempered when others she cares about are hurt. This is shown in the the first episode when she gets angry at Emma for insulting Jesse. She is very kind as she does convince Adam to give Emma a second chance.

characters.name: The Guardian
characters.description: TheGuardian(played by Timothy Burd) is a character on the television show Mutant X. The Guardian was a member of The Strand who was assigned to protect Gabriel Ashlocke's successor The Child. The Guardian was a rare form of Feral, a combination of whip scorpion and hobo spider. He had increased strength, agility and secreted poisoned acidic mucus which was deadly to his victims. According to Precognitive Psionic John Bishop's prophecy, The Child would not rise to power until 'two bloods were dashed,' that is, until The Guardian had murdered Nathan Reynolds and Kara Whitely, two of the four New Mutant 'parents' who had contributed DNA to The Child's genetic code. Nearly indestructible, The Guardian's one weak spot was between the exoskeleton plates of his lower back. Once Shalimar hit him there with a shovel, he literally melted away into a pile of goo. The Guardian is a Feral which means he has had his DNA spliced with that of an animal resulting in either physical or mental characteristics of the animal.
